arts.ttl: Jan Paul van Hecke reveals what was said during his heated exchange with Pep Guardiola following Brighton's victory over Man City
arts.sum: Van Hecke insisted that his heated exchange with Guardiola at the end of Brighton's win over City was nothing more than a conversation about his scuffle with Haaland in stoppage time.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy confirms next step after emotional Manchester United 'goodbye'
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy looked emotional as he waved goodbye to the Stretford End following Manchester United's comfortable 3-0 win at home to Leicester City on Sunday

arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy ends Man Utd reign with victory
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy’s short reign as caretaker head coach of Manchester United ended with a 3-0 win over Leicester on Sunday. After the sacking of Erik ten Hag, Van Nistelrooy stepped in to take over and he has overseen some good results including the win over PAOK in the Europa League on Thursday. Rúben Amorim […] The post Van Nistelrooy ends Man Utd reign with victory appeared first on Football Oranje.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy signs off ‘amazing’ Man Utd stint with ‘important’ win
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy bid a fond farewell to Old Trafford on Saturday as he led Manchester United to victory in his final game as interim manager. The Red Devils thanks to a brilliant strike from Bruno Fernandes, a Victor Kristiansen own goal and a golazo from Alejandro Garnacho. “It was professional, you could see that […] The post Ruud van Nistelrooy signs off ‘amazing’ Man Utd stint with ‘important’ win first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy EMBARRASSES Ten Hag with Man Utd interim spell
arts.sum: Ten Hag was sacked following the Red Devils’ worst ever start to a Premier League season and Van Nistelrooy was immediately placed in interim charge at Old Trafford. Ruud van Nistelrooy has embarrassed Erik ten Hag with his spell as interim manager at Manchester United .

arts.ttl: Ruud Van Nistelrooy opens up on his Man United future after interim spell in charge comes to an end with dominant win against Leicester
arts.sum: NATHAN SALT AT OLD TRAFFORD: Ruud Van Nistelrooy rounded off his four-game spell in charge with a 3-0 win over Leicester, taking him to three wins and a draw since taking on the role.

arts.ttl: The Verdict: Van Nistelrooy hands over an improved Man Utd
arts.sum: Tyrone Marshall of the Manchester Evening News joins Ben Ransom to discuss Ruud van Nistelrooy's final game in interim charge of Manchester United as they defeated Leicester.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy waiting to discover Man Utd future after ‘special’ send-off
arts.sum: Van Nistelrooy’s final match as interim coach before Ruben Amorim takes charge finished with a 3-0 win over Leicester

arts.ttl: Managing Man Utd has been 'amazing' - Van Nistelrooy
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy says managing Manchester United for four matches has been "an amazing period", after signing off as interim boss with a 3-0 win over Leicester.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy leaves Ruben Amorim with huge decision after breaking Man Utd record
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is poised to take over as Manchester United manager on Monday after Ruud van Nistelrooy oversaw three wins and a draw from his four matches as interim boss
